title: carex illegitima
intro: Carex illegitima, also known as the "false cattail" or "wild cattail," is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Carex illegitima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Carex illegitima include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or oil.
